case_title: MOREHOUSE, THOMAS VS DEBAUBIGNY, ANDRE (VINTRUST LLC)

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,100.00 FILED BY MOREHOUSE, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT DEBAUBIGNY, ANDRE (VINTRUST LLC) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DEBAUBIGNY, ANDRE (VINTRUST LLC)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEBAUBIGNY, ANDRE (VINTRUST LLC) DEFT FAILED TO APPEAR. PER SECTION 12 OF CONSULTING AGREEMENT, THE PARTIES AGREE THAT ALL CONTROVERSIES, DISPUTES AND/OR CLAIMS ARISING OUT OF THE AGREEMENT SHALL BE SUBMITTED TO FINAL & BINDING ARBITRATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
